data.title: Bitwise: Ethereum treasury strategy is becoming mainstream, and ETH is no longer limited to hedging or speculation tools
data.description: In its latest financial report, Bitwise Asset Management stated that while digital asset treasury strategies previously centered around Bitcoin, companies are now allocating large amounts of ETH. Analyst Max Shannon noted that ETH treasury is no longer a fringe topic but is becoming a structural pillar of the cryptocurrency capital market. ETH is no longer just a hedging or speculative tool, but a programmable financial asset that connects corporate financing with the on-chain economy. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin ATM Operator Accused of Copyright Infringement and Trade Secret Misappropriation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, AML Software Inc. has filed a federal lawsuit against Athena Bitcoin Inc., alleging that the Bitcoin ATM operator orchestrated a fraudulent scheme to steal computer source code used for Bitcoin ATMs. The lawsuit, submitted to the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Florida, claims that Athena engaged in a series of transactions and signed agreements with entities knowingly transferring AML's source code.

AML asserts that portions of the source code are considered trade secrets, accessible only to developers who have signed confidentiality agreements. The company accuses Athena of copyright infringement and illegal misappropriation of these trade secrets.

data.description:
DeFi Development Corp, the first publicly listed company structured around a Solana-based treasury strategy, has expanded its share repurchase program to $100 million, marking one of the largest stock buyback initiatives in the digital asset sector. The company announced on Wednesday that its Board of Directors had approved an increase to the authorization from its initial […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/solana-whale-defi-development-unleashes-massive-100m-stock-buyback/

data.title: Bitcoin Falls Below Key Risk Band, Potential Support at $90,000-$105,000
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Bitcoin has recently fallen below a critical risk band that typically indicates a profit-taking zone. If Bitcoin can return to this range, it would suggest a market recovery. However, failure to rebound could lead to a decline towards the support range of approximately $90,000 to $105,000.

data.title: Autris, a publicly listed company, plans to raise $30 million and acquire BitCorp Capital
data.description: Autris, a publicly traded company with a Bitcoin strategy, announced the acquisition of BitCorp Capital for an undisclosed amount, significantly expanding its Bitcoin financial strategy. Autris also disclosed plans to raise up to $30 million from accredited investors through a Rule D 506(b) filing. (Newsfilecorp)

data.title: LAC Stock Jumps 100% as Trump Administration Targets Stake in Canadian Miner
data.description:
LAC stock soared 100% on news the Trump administration could take a stake in the company’s Nevada lithium project.
source: https://tokenist.com/lac-stock-jumps-100-as-trump-administration-targets-stake-in-canadian-miner/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=lac-stock-jumps-100-as-trump-administration-targets-stake-in-canadian-miner

data.title: Ethereum Supercycle Ahead? Why Wall Street and AI Could Push ETH Beyond Historic Cycles
data.description:
Could we be on the brink of an Ethereum supercycle? There are strong indications that both Wall Street's increasing involvement in cryptocurrency markets and the rapidly evolving role of artificial intelligence might propel Ethereum (ETH) beyond its previous historic price cycles. This potential shift could signify a transformative phase for Ethereum, driven by institutional investment and technological advancements in AI, fostering greater adoption and usage of the Ethereum network, and ultimately leading to unprecedented growth in its value and market position.
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereum-supercycle-ahead-why-wall-street-and-ai-could-push-eth-beyond-historic-cycles/

data.title: Solana Ecosystem Perpetual Contract DEX BULK Completes $8 Million Seed Round, Led by Robot Ventures and Others
data.description: BULK, a perpetual contract DEX for the Solana ecosystem, announced on the X platform that it has completed an $8 million seed round of funding, led by 6th Man Ventures and Robot Ventures, with participation from Big Brain Holdings, Wintermute, and Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko. BULK aims to address issues such as priority fee surges and network congestion by integrating its execution layer directly into Solana's validator stack. The platform plans to launch a testnet in the coming weeks, with a mainnet launch planned for Q4.

data.title: Bitlight Labs' official Twitter post hints at a possible TGE
data.description: Bitlight Labs, the developer of the RGB protocol infrastructure, launched its token symbol LIGHT on the X platform, with the date marked as September 27, possibly hinting at an upcoming TGE.

data.title: USDT supply on Ethereum reaches $80 billion, surpassing Tron to regain dominance
data.description: Ethereum has regained its position as the primary network for USDT supply, with a supply of $80 billion, surpassing Tron after falling behind in early March. Ethereum's recovery suggests that users value its mature DeFi ecosystem and institutional-grade infrastructure over Tron's lower transaction costs. Currently, daily stablecoin transfers on Ethereum are approaching 1 million, and the supply of both networks is reported to have remained relatively stable at approximately $75 billion to $80 billion for most of 2025. (The Block)

data.title: Theunipcs.eth, a smart money that once made 60 times profit from trading MAGA, first established a position in ASTER
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, smart money (@theunipcs), which previously profited 60x from MAGA, has entered its first ASTER position. In the past hour, the address theunipcs.eth withdrew 3.241 million ASTER tokens from #Gate, valued at $7.319 million, at a price of $2.25 (the actual cost is unknown).

data.title: Over the past hour, the entire network has experienced a liquidation of over $23 million, mainly due to short positions.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of US$23.7769 million, of which US$21.5324 million were short positions and US$2.2446 million were long positions.

data.title: Meteora proposes to distribute 3% of TGE reserves to Jupiter stakers in the form of liquidity position NFTs
data.description: SolanaFloor announced on the X platform that Meteora, the Solana ecosystem liquidity protocol, has unveiled a new proposal following backlash over its JUP staker distribution plan. 3% of the Meteora (Meteora Asset Management) TGE reserve will be distributed to Jupiter stakers in the form of liquidity position NFTs on a time-weighted basis, providing them with Meteora/USDC liquidity exposure upon the token's launch.

data.title: Galaxy Digital's associated address withdrew another 13 million ASTER tokens, worth $29.12 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address associated with Galaxy Digital withdrew another 13 million ASTER tokens, valued at $29.12 million. The total ASTER held by this address has increased to 46 million, valued at $103 million. The tokens accumulated over the past 24 hours now account for 2.77% of the circulating supply.
